caseStudy.title: Operational Decision Platform
caseStudy.description: Real-time operational intelligence for a logistics network.
caseStudy.overview: A national logistics operator needed to move from reactive incident management to proactive operational optimization across a network of 400 distribution centers and 8,000 vehicles. Decisions were made locally with limited network-wide visibility.
caseStudy.problem: Route planning was performed statically each morning, with no mechanism to adapt to real-time conditions such as traffic, vehicle breakdowns, or surge demand. Dispatch coordinators operated in silos, unable to rebalance resources across regions during imbalances.
caseStudy.solution: A real-time operational platform was built, ingesting telemetry from all vehicles and facilities and presenting a unified operational picture. Dynamic route optimization re-planned deliveries in response to real-time conditions. Cross-region resource rebalancing recommendations were surfaced to senior coordinators with one-click deployment.

results.summary: Operational coordinators now manage the entire network from a single platform, with AI-assisted decision support that surfaces the right actions at the right time.
